titleStmt.title: SII 8.266: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 266. (A.R. No. 661 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ— komāṟupaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu [tri] tiyai(y)yum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ rājendra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Akaram śrīmuṭivaḻaṅkucoḻaccatu rvvedi maṅkalattu muṭivaḻaṅkucoḻaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tirumuṟṟattu śrīsenāpatiāḻvār śrīpaṇ
ṭārattāṟku Ivvūr komaṭattu Uyyakkoṇṭāṉbha ṭṭaṉ bhāryyai Eṅkaḷ tamaiyaṉār komapuṟattu keśavabha ṭṭa sarvvakra tuyājiyārai mutukaṇṇākauṭaiya kaṟpakaṅkoṇṭiccāṉiyen dharmmadā ṉapramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu . Ivvūril Eṅkaḷukku sādhā raṇamāy muṉṉāḷ paṟṟiliyāykkiṭanta nilamāṉa koḻuntaṉāḻvār taṉper nāṭṭik kāṇieṟaṭṭu paṟṟukiṟa nāḷil Eṅkaḷai kūṭṭāte paṟṟiyilāy śceda m peṟukaiyāle kaṭamaiiṟukkai Āḻvāṟke paramākaiyā
l Ivaṉ kaṭamai Iṟāte poy Ivaṉ perkaṭamaikku puṇaippaṭṭa śrīgovinda pperumāḷ Innāyaṉārkku Ivaṉ perkaṭamaikku viṟṟa nilaṅkaḷil Eṉ bharttā viṉ kūṟāy Eṉṉutāna Oṉṟupātiyil Ivaṉ viṟṟa nilam ma�- kiṟā�kkum Okka Ivvūril nikki Uḷḷa nilaṅkaḷil Āṟṟūrkūṟṟile tirunāmattukkāṇiyākap paṟṟikkoḷḷavum nāṉ Iṉnāyaṉāṟku dharmmadā ṉamāka kuṭutta nilamāvatu piṭākai coḻaṇukkanallūr śrīde vivatikku meṟkut tiruvaraṅkavākkālukkut teṟku 4- kaṇṇāṟṟuThis word is represented by a symbol.2- catirattu Āṟṟukku meṟku
ppaṭṭa nilattu nilam �m 2- kaṇṇāṟṟuThis word is represented by a symbol.1- catirattu śrīgovinda pperumāḷ vilaiyāl tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattu Eṉ ṉopātiyāy nāṉ kuṭutta nilam �-m Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvākkālukkut teṟku 1- kaṇṇāṟṟuThis word is represented by a symbol.1- catu rattu Eṭuppu Iraṇṭiṉāl nilattu nilam �-m Uttirattu maṉaieṭuppu Uṭpaṭa nilam � kiḻakkuval muṉpu Āḻvār kūṟāy Ivaṉ taṉvaḻiyāl Iṉnāyaṉārutāṉa nilam nikki Eṉṉutāṉa nilam kiḻakku I �-m Āka Eṉṉutāṉa maṉaieṭuppu Uṭpaṭṭa nilam � Iṉnilam(ā) Araimā AraikkāThe inscription is incomplete at the right end.
Digital edition of SII 8.266 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
